Robert gave steadily for six years, then went quiet after your director changed. A warm reconnect — no ask — in your voice.
Hi Robert — I was looking back at what Hope Foundation built, and your name kept coming up. Six years of steady support helped us open two family shelters. No ask here — I'd just love to show you where it led.
